title: Cisco security advisory (AV26-706)
description: On July 15, 2026, Cisco published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Cisco RoomOS Release 11 and earlier On-Premises Operation   versions prior to 11.32.6.0
Cisco RoomOS Release 11 and earlier Cloud-Aware Operation   versions prior to RoomOS 11.39.1.1
Cisco RoomOS Release 26 On-Premises Operation   versions prior to 26.5.2.2
Cisco RoomOS Release 26 Cloud-Aware Operation   versions prior to RoomOS June 2026 (26.7.1.7)
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
